metadata.title: YAMI — Your Art, Museum & Identity
metadata.description: The first social, automated record of human cultural engagement. Discover museums as a visitor or manage your institution through the staff dashboard.

hero.visitorSubline: The first social, automated record of human cultural engagement. Every visit, every masterpiece, every hour in the gallery — yours forever.
hero.museumSubline: YAMI gives your museum a visitor engagement layer that syncs with TMS, surfaces analytics, and brings interactive discovery to every gallery — with near-zero overhead to implement.

visitorBento.passportDesc: Every gallery visit, every ticket scanned, every masterpiece — automatically logged. Miles walked, hours in galleries, your most-visited movements.
visitorBento.rewardsDesc: Turn a casual stroll into a quest. Earn badges and rewards for exploring collections.
visitorBento.aiDesc: Your personal curator — suggesting your next must-see exhibit based on your taste and history.
visitorBento.socialDesc: Share your passport, compare museum journeys with friends, see what's trending in your circle, and plan visits together.

visitorQuote.quote: Once a visitor enters the gallery, they become invisible.

museumBento.tmsDesc: Connect directly to TMS and keep your collection data in sync. No duplicate entry, no data drift. Your source of truth stays your source of truth — YAMI just makes it visible to visitors.
museumBento.analyticsDesc: Understand which exhibitions resonate, how visitors interact, and what drives return visits.
museumBento.kidsDesc: Scavenger hunts, badge challenges, and guided quests that turn galleries into playgrounds.
museumBento.discoveryDesc: Help visitors find exhibitions, events, and activities before they arrive and while they explore. Better discoverability means more foot traffic and deeper engagement.

museumHowItWorks.title: How it works
museumHowItWorks.step1Body: Sign up and submit your museum details. Our team reviews and activates your workspace — no technical setup required.
museumHowItWorks.step2Body: YAMI syncs with The Museum System so your collection data flows in automatically. No duplicate entry, no migration headaches.
museumHowItWorks.step3Body: Interactive activities for kids, exhibition discovery tools, and engagement analytics — all live in your dashboard from day one.

museumQuote.quote: Make every visit unforgettable — without adding to your workload.
museumQuote.attribution: Low overhead. High engagement. That's YAMI for museums.

footer.tagline: YAMI is revolutionizing the social experience of our shared culture and art. Beta testing begins soon. Open source on release.

signIn.title: Sign in
signIn.description: Enter your email and password to sign in to your account.

signUp.title: Create an account
signUp.description: Enter your details to create a new account.
signUp.name: Name
signUp.profileFailed: Account created, but profile setup failed. Please try signing in again.

shell.signInRequiredDescription: You need an account and workspace to access the dashboard.
shell.museumStaffOnlyDescription: You need to be in at least one organization workspace to use this dashboard. Request access below or wait for an invite. If you are not museum staff, use the visitor app instead.
shell.invalidMuseumContextNoMuseums: Museum context is invalid because no museums are available.
shell.invalidMuseumContextSwitched: Museum context is invalid (likely deleted). Switched to the first available museum.
shell.workspaceWarning: Assigned museum is invalid (likely deleted). Ask an admin to reassign this workspace.
shell.completeRequiredMuseumDetails: Please complete all required museum details.
shell.pendingApproval: Your most recent workspace request is pending approval.
shell.workspacePendingActivationDescription: Your request for {name} has been submitted. You can access the dashboard after an admin approves this organization.
shell.openVisitorAppWhileWaiting: Open visitor app while you wait
shell.heroDescription: Keep your museum profile current so visitors always see accurate details in the mobile app.
shell.workspaceSetupIncompleteDescription: This workspace is not linked to a museum yet. Ask an admin to assign a museum in the admin Organizations section.
shell.comingSoonDescription: The {section} section will be part of the next iteration.

organizations.title: Your workspaces
organizations.description: Organizations you belong to and their current museum assignment.
organizations.empty: You are not a member of any workspace yet.
organizations.requestDialogDescription: Submit a new museum workspace request for admin approval.

images.title: Images
images.description: Upload files or add image URLs, reorder the gallery, and set the primary card image.
images.urlPlaceholderPaste: Paste an image URL and click Add
images.uploadHint: Upload one or more local images
images.orChooseFiles: or choose files from your computer

museumDetails.title: Museum Information
museumDetails.description: This information appears in your visitor-facing app profile.
museumDetails.emptyStateDescription: Select a museum context to edit details.
museumDetails.invalidDescription: This museum context is invalid or no longer exists.

ai.confirmDescription: This will overwrite current form fields with data from Google Places, then use web scraping to fill missing fields when possible. Please review everything before saving.
ai.prefillSuccess: Auto-fill results loaded into the form. Nothing has been saved yet.
ai.prefillNeedsWebsite: Google Places loaded partial results. Add the official website to run web-scrape fallback for remaining fields.
ai.prefillWebsiteSkipped: Skipped website fallback. You can enter a website and run auto-fill again anytime.
ai.websitePromptDescription: Google Places did not return an official website. Enter one to let web scraping fill remaining missing fields.
ai.imagesImported: {count, plural, one {Imported # image to gallery.} other {Imported # images to gallery.}}

errors.latitudeRange: Latitude must be a number between -90 and 90.
errors.longitudeRange: Longitude must be a number between -180 and 180.
errors.prefillFailed: Failed to load AI museum details.

exhibitions.title: Exhibitions
exhibitions.selectMuseumDescription: Select a museum context to manage exhibitions and halls.
exhibitions.description: Organize exhibition structure and halls. Use the Interactions tab to attach visitor interactions.
exhibitions.noExhibitions: No exhibitions yet. Add one to start organizing halls.

interactions.title: Interactions
interactions.selectMuseumDescription: Select a museum context to manage exhibitions and attach interactions.
interactions.description: Manage exhibitions and halls, then attach interactions (quizzes, scavenger steps, badges, info/audio) to each hall.
interactions.noExhibitions: No exhibitions yet. Add one to create halls and attach interactions.

addExhibitionForm.title: New exhibition
addExhibitionForm.description: Add an exhibition to attach halls and interactions to.
addExhibitionForm.name: Name

exhibitionCard.removeExhibitionDescription: This will remove "{name}" and all its halls and interactions. This cannot be undone.

addHallForm.title: New hall
addHallForm.description: Add a hall to this exhibition to attach interactions.
addHallForm.name: Name

hallRow.chooseTypeDescription: Pick one to add to this hall.
hallRow.removeHallDescription: This will remove "{name}" and its interactions.
hallRow.removeInteractionDescription: This interaction will be removed from this hall. This cannot be undone.
hallRow.interactionsConfigureInTab: Interactions are configured in the Interactions tab.

configForm.title: Title
configForm.question: Question
configForm.questionPlaceholder: What year was this work created?
configForm.atLeastTwoOptions: At least two options are required.
configForm.selectCorrectAnswer: Please select the correct answer (0-based index).

adminMuseums.noMuseumsMatch: No museums match current search and filters.

analytics.dateRangeDesc: Choose date range, sort order, and optionally compare to the previous period.
analytics.checkInsDescCompare: This period vs previous period (static example).
analytics.engagementTrendDesc: Weekly check-ins as a trend line (same period).
analytics.cumulativeVisitsDesc: Running total of check-ins over the selected period.
analytics.ratingsDistributionDesc: Number of ratings per star (1–5). Static example data.
analytics.visitorSourcesDesc: Where visitors discover your museum (App, social, website, walk-in).
analytics.exhibitionPopularityDesc: Share of visits by exhibition or zone (static example).

debug.title: Manual Data Entry for Museums & Events
debug.intro: Use this page to insert dummy content while shaping the product. These entries go straight to Convex, so treat it as a staging-only tool.
debug.museumIntakeDesc: Add a museum entry with location + metadata.
debug.eventIntakeDesc: Attach to a museum or create a standalone event.
debug.noMuseumLocationHint: If no museum is selected, you must provide a location below.
debug.noMuseumsAddFirst: No museums yet. Add the first one.
debug.cityStateZipRequired: City, state, and zip code are required.
debug.latLngValid: Latitude and longitude must be valid numbers.
debug.museumSaved: Museum saved. Add another or switch to events.
debug.startEndRequired: Start and end dates are required.
debug.endAfterStart: End date must be after start date.
debug.locationRequiredNoMuseum: Location is required when no museum is selected.
debug.latLngRequiredNoMuseum: Latitude and longitude are required when no museum is selected.
